title: Furious
description: The Furious mod is a mod that adds new entities,tools,blocks and more.
body:
The Furious Mod brings a wave of power and discovery to your Minecraft world! Explore new dimensions of creativity with unique entities, powerful tools, and mysterious blocks. Wield the mighty Dimensional Sword to unleash otherworldly energy, or harness the strength of the Ardent Block to craft and build like never before. Whether you’re battling fierce new mobs or experimenting with advanced materials, The Furious Mod transforms Minecraft into a thrilling, unpredictable adventure.

Changelog -

V1 - Added Dimensional Sword,Pickaxe and Axe, Added Ardent block.

V1.0.1 - Added a new biome, new dimension, a small dashboard,a small invetory tab and a new fluid called fluin

V1.0.2 - Coming Soon in Feburary or March due to Missing Files, Will Be fixed soon

Available Versions in Neoforge 1.21.1,1.21.8 and Forge 1.20.1

Made by the Furious Team

Created in 2025
